name: oh-my-kimicode
description: OmO agent harness for Kimi Code CLI
skillInstructions: You are running with oh-my-kimicode (OmO for Kimi Code). Prefer the oh-my-kimicode MCP tools for structural search (codegraph) and LSP. Respect project rules from .omo/rules/ and AGENTS.md. On Windows, prefer the git_bash MCP for shell operations when available.
